Strip_Summary: First-person dark room with dim screen showing coordinates. Stickman hands at frame edges.
Stickman silhouette in turban before screen in dark undefined room. Single light source.
Stickman silhouette in deep shadow  -  only black turban outline visible. Isolation.
Destroyed compound ruins. Stickman silhouette facing rubble and smoke.
Bold text: 'Same building. Same explosion. Same morning.'
Bold text: 'You survived. Probably. No one has confirmed.'
Small stickman child in ornate religious household with scripture books and prayer rugs.
Child stickman in holy city household. Family lineage symbols on walls.
Child stickman at window watching revolutionary crowd with flags flooding streets below.
Street scene after revolution  -  smoke and overturned vehicles. Changed world.
Father stickman with black turban and glasses walking into government building. Guards saluting.
Child stickman in walled compound courtyard. Armed guards at gate. High walls enclosing childhood.
Child in compound garden with mother planting roses. World beyond walls unreachable.
Religious classroom with child stickman. Teacher at board. Father shadow in doorway.
Father stickman hand on subject shoulder. Other siblings grouped farther in background.
Split interior: peaceful compound room vs television showing war explosions and soldiers.
Boys from school leaving for front. Some returning wounded. Child watching from behind bulletproof glass.
Teen stickman in olive IRGC uniform and beret volunteering for deployment.
Military training camp. Soldiers and trucks. Son of powerful man still digging trenches.
Stickman in uniform at compound gate. Other soldiers marching to front beyond.
Battlefield  -  stickman in trench. Explosions, gas clouds, fallen comrades.
Bold text: 'You survive the war. That becomes your first qualification.'
Father stickman with glasses named supreme authority. Grand ceremony. Subject watches at age twenty.
Father ascending to grand ornate chair. Chair defining every room subject enters forever.
Stickman in seminary robes walking through arched hallway. Books and scrolls. Theological quiet.
Seminary quiet after battlefield. Pages turning. Silence as weapon learned from war.
Stickman receiving modest certificate. Grand clerics with larger turbans looking down.
Wedding scene  -  stickman with chador wife. Political figures attending. Power map.
Political marriage. Parliament speaker's daughter. Three children follow.
Stickman walking into grand office  -  plain door no nameplate. Father at desk.
Bold text: 'You don't need a seat. You decide who gets one.'
Stickman at desk outside father's door. Line of officials waiting to enter.
Generals ministers intelligence chief all needing approval from gatekeeper at the door.
Stickman on phone in shadow. TV showing election results. Hardline figure at podium.
Stickman in shadow contemplating invisible power. Father's chair visible in background.
Streets filling with millions. Green uprising beginning. 2009 marker.
Green banners and open faces. Young people born after revolution feeling no debt.
Protesters organizing on phones. Sharing videos censors cannot delete fast enough.
Stickman at head of table in father's office. Military commanders around. Maps on wall.
Stickman on phone giving three-word order. Militia charging into crowds.
Crowd chanting subject's name in streets. Cursing him. Fists and open mouths.
Bold text: 'You hear every word. You stay behind the wall.'
Crackdown lasting weeks. Night arrests. Morning bodies. Subject never showing face.
Father making public statement calling demonstrators foreign agents. Subject wrote the statement.
Empty streets by Sunday. Hospitals full. Friday order executed completely.
2019 fuel protests. 1500 dead in three days. Internet going dark across country.
2022 women removing headscarves in streets. Burning fabric. Defiance.
Bold text: 'You give the same order. The militia gives the same answer.'
Each crackdown making subject more powerful and more invisible simultaneously.
Bold text: 'You are becoming your own shadow.'
Elderly father with shaking hands and thick glasses. Officials whispering about succession.
Other candidates  -  senior clerics with decades more study and higher titles.
Stickman in shadow with military commanders behind. Holding the guard. Guard holding guns.
Pre-dawn sky  -  missile trails approaching compound. Air defense failing to activate.
Compound shaking and breaking apart. Concrete slabs falling. Dust and fire.
Destroyed compound rubble. Father's broken chair. Dust settling. 37 years ended.
Wife's chador fabric visible in rubble. Same building. Same silence after.
Memory flash  -  last image of wife arguing about children's sleeping arrangements.
Stickman pulled from debris. Bandaged. Something wrong with body  -  unknown which part.
Single tremor from shoulder to wrist then stopping. Hands folded. Medic not noticing.
Three small stickman silhouettes. Classified stamp overlay. Question marks floating.
Split: child at window 1979 vs wounded man in rubble 2026. Same person decades apart.
Three stickmen at emergency council table. Flags. Crisis atmosphere. Interim control.
President stickman wanting negotiation. Guard commander blocking with crossed arms.
Grid of screens showing clerics in turbans. Some screens dark. Virtual emergency session.
Multiple cleric stickmen with white turbans. Religious texts. Real theological authority.
Guard commander making phone calls. One by one. Each council member contacted.
Council members resisting. Citing religious law and precedent. Commander repeating name.
Bold text: 'One name. The son.'
Stickman's modest certificate next to grand empty throne. Scale contrast.
Scales image: guns outweighing holy books. Behind closed doors. Desaturated.
Council chamber hands raised in vote. Stickman silhouette named. No celebration.
Bold text: 'First time in forty-seven years. Father to son.'
Timeline: revolution destroying monarchy 1979 flowing to becoming monarchy 2026.
Bold text: 'The crown was supposed to be burned. Now it's a turban.'
Founder's portrait on wall staring down. System overthrew king  -  now crowning prince.
Empty grand chair. Shadow figure nearby but not sitting. Guards standing.
No inauguration photo. No video. No voice on radio. Highest office held by silence.
Left hand signing document. Right arm hidden in shadow. Rumor of paralysis.
Aerial burning city  -  smoke columns. Stickman silhouette watching from dark room.
Over 2000 civilians dead. 3.2 million displaced. Numbers on briefing screen.
Displacement camps without tents. People in school gyms and mosque courtyards.
Oil refineries burning. Power grid destroyed. Dark sky over blacked-out city.
Damaged hospital. Broken red crescent symbol. Over 20 medical facility strikes.
Stickmen looking at blank phone screens. No signal. Internet cut nationwide.
Woman giving birth in dark basement. No electricity. No doctor. Ceiling shaking from shelling.
Multiple small command posts. Officers acting alone. No central authority. Decentralized.
Missiles launching from hidden positions. Impacts on military bases across Gulf.
Map showing closed strait. Stopped tankers. Global oil prices spiking.
President stickman at empty desk. Guard commander at operational desk with screens.
Gatekeeper for thirty years. Now gate removed entirely. Guard walks without knocking.
Complete darkness. Faint stickman outline. Phone receiver. Orders from nowhere.
Bold text: 'That last part is the question no one asks out loud.'
Empty podium. Cameras pointed at nothing. Journalists waiting in empty room.
Four panels: wheelchair / grave / airplane / erased figure. Question marks.
Propaganda posters with title but blank face. Guards saluting the poster.
Bold text: 'They may not need you alive. Just named.'
Walls covered with father's portrait. 37 years of visible rule. Stickmen walking past.
Empty wall where portrait should be. Blank frame. Two months invisible rule.
Stickman silhouette at desk. Reports from three fronts arriving simultaneously.
Bandwidth overload  -  flickering lights, radio static, losing thread. Left hand moves. Returns.
Bold text: 'The shadow became the throne. And the throne is empty.'
Same dark room as opening. Same dim light. Same silhouette. No windows.
Father's voice echoed visually as quote floating in darkness.
Lived entire life by one sentence. Shadow at ten. Shadow at twenty. Shadow at fifty-six.
Montage: child behind robes → soldier → phone whisperer → shadow on throne casting no light.
Stickman silhouette  -  half proof half question mark. Philosophical ambiguity.
Revolution made republic. Republic made dynasty. Dynasty made ghost. Timeline visual.
Father's chair 37 years. Revolution survived. Subject's shadow of chair. Revolution becomes family name.
Bold text: 'You are that ghost. If you are still alive.'
